entries.title: Egyptian Chinese University
entries.content: ECU is a private Egyptian university located in Cairo, established under Egyptian law. It offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs across nine faculties.

entries.title: Faculty of Engineering and Technology
entries.content: The Faculty of Engineering and Technology offers programs in Software Engineering, Systems Engineering, and related disciplines.

entries.title: Faculty of Computers and Information Systems
entries.content: The Faculty of Computers and Information Systems offers programs in Computer Science, Information Systems, and related computing disciplines.

entries.title: Faculty of Economics and International Trade
entries.content: The Faculty of Economics and International Trade offers programs in economics, business, and international trade.

entries.title: Faculty of Pharmacy and Drug Technology
entries.content: The Faculty of Pharmacy and Drug Technology offers pharmacy and pharmaceutical science programs.

entries.title: Faculty of Physical Therapy
entries.content: The Faculty of Physical Therapy offers programs in physiotherapy and rehabilitation sciences.

entries.title: Faculty of Arts and Design
entries.content: The Faculty of Arts and Design offers programs in visual arts, graphic design, and related creative disciplines.

entries.title: Faculty of Veterinary Medicine
entries.content: The Faculty of Veterinary Medicine offers programs in veterinary science and animal health.

entries.title: Faculty of Mass Communication
entries.content: The Faculty of Mass Communication offers programs in journalism, media production, and communication studies.

entries.title: Faculty of Law
entries.content: The Faculty of Law offers programs in Egyptian and international law.

entries.title: Contact Us
entries.content: Contact ECU via the official website at ecu.edu.eg. The student portal is available at sis.ecu.edu.eg.

entries.title: Library
entries.content: ECU Library provides academic resources and study spaces for students and faculty.
